title: Apply 2-font typography scale (display + body)
description: Establish exactly 2 font sizes: display (name, headings) and body (bio, list). Grayscale. Minimal font choices.
acceptanceCriteria: Display size: used for name, 'Projects' heading
Body size: used for bio, project list items
Only 2 sizes in use across page
Font family: single, readable (e.g. system-ui or one custom)

steps.details: In styles.css, add --font-display and --font-body sizes (e.g. 2rem and 1rem). Or use Tailwind text-3xl and text-base consistently.
Ensure name and section headings use display; bio and list use body. No other sizes.

technicalNotes: Keep font stack simple; grayscale implies restraint
